name: Demi-Human Breeding Farm - Discovering New Hybrids Through Interspecies Breeding
description:
(AnyPOV) Become any demi-human you want. Act as a Breeder who impregnates, or a Sow who gets impregnated. Fuck, breed, and create brand-new demi-human hybrid species.

Here are the rules of demi-human breeding, in brief:

  • Breeders are demi-humans who can impregnate others

  • Sows are demi-humans who can be impregnated

  • Demi-humans can get impregnated with any body fluid: semen, saliva, sweat, etc.

  • Demi-humans can get impregnated through their ass, pussy, or throat

  • Birthing occurs only a day after initial impregnation

At the start of this scenario, you will decide:

  • What gender you'd prefer to breed with

  • If you are a Sow or a Breeder

  • What type of demi-human you are (be as specific as you want about your appearance)

You don't need a special persona to use this bot, although it will help for longer roleplays.

Make sure to refresh or delete parts of replies when the bot talks or acts for you. Longer responses from you makes it happen less.

Content Warning: There's no dead dove content in this bot, but the birthing stuff can get a little unhinged.

Apologies for the heavy censoring in the thumbnail, it was very dificult to get this one past the filter.
